items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】GG Small Bucket Shoulder Bag. This small bucket shoulder bag is crafted in red leather. This accessory features a hook closure and a webbed shoulder strap design, cleverly blending functionality with a modern look. Red leather, light gold-tone metal hardware, red and green webbed strap, cotton-linen blend lining, inside: 2 main compartments and 1 zip pocket, with Gucci logo zip pull, adjustable shoulder strap (39.5 cm high) weight: approx. 0.9 kg.
items.name_cn:
💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】GG Small Bucket Shoulder Bag. This small bucket shoulder bag is crafted in red leather. This accessory features a hook closure and a webbed shoulder strap design, cleverly blending functionality with a modern look. Red leather, light gold-tone metal hardware, red and green webbed strap, cotton-linen blend lining, inside: 2 main compartments and 1 zip pocket, with Gucci logo zip pull, adjustable shoulder strap (39.5 cm high) weight: approx. 0.9 kg.
Model: 782904.
Size: 25.5 x 28 x 16.5 cm.
Color: Red/Original Leather.
Italian Creation
Model height 177 cm
Max capacity: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods, long wallet, and lipstick

Decorated with 2 Monogram Flower pendants, adding a very feminine impression.
